channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Raptors level series with Cavaliers despite poor shooting, shifting playoff momentum
item.description: The Toronto Raptors have unexpectedly tied their playoff series 2-2 against the Cleveland Cavaliers after a gritty 93-89 win, despite delivering one of the worst shooting performances by a winning tea...

item.title: Key Differences Between Niger and Nigeria You Should Know
item.description: Plenty people dey confuse Niger and Nigeria because their names almost dey similar and dem dey West Africa side by side. But make I tell you, dem no be the same country at all. Niger na French-speakin...

item.title: Smoke from Navotas landfill fire spreads to nearby Pasay City
item.description: A fire has broken out at the Navotas landfill, causing significant smoke that has spread to neighboring areas, including Pasay City. Local authorities have been monitoring the situation and have advis...

item.title: Traffic Restrictions in Islamabad's Red Zone and Serena Hotel Area Removed
item.description: On Sunday, Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar announced that the traffic restrictions around Islamabad's Red Zone and Serena Hotel have been lifted. These restrictions had been in pl...

item.title: Brisbane Lions remove post featuring Lachie Neale’s daughter following mother’s concern
item.description: During Lachie Neale's milestone 300th AFL game, the Brisbane Lions shared a social media post featuring Neale carrying his young daughter Piper onto the MCG. Traditionally, players run through a banne...

item.title: Three Mourners Killed and Two Abducted in Attack on Burial Returnees in Benue
item.description: Fresh violence don happen for Benue State as unknown gunmen attack some mourners wey dey return from burial ceremony for Sati-Ikov area of Ushongo Local Government. According to residents, the attack ...

item.title: First Nations University Marks 50 Years of Indigenous Education with Spring Powwow Celebration
item.description: On April 26, 2026, the First Nations University of Canada in Regina hosted a vibrant celebration in honour of 50 years of Indigenous education. The event featured a spring powwow that brought together...

item.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi visits Pakistan twice in two days to discuss regional peace efforts
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi paid a second visit to Pakistan in two days following a short trip to Oman as part of his tri-nation diplomatic tour. The visits come amid ongoing efforts, espe...

item.title: Baguio City Tops Regional Cities in GDP Per Capita for 2025
item.description: According to the Philippine Statistics Authority (PSA) in the Cordillera region, Baguio City emerged as the regional city with the highest GDP per capita in 2025, registering P485,400. This figure hig...

item.title: Threats against President Trump highlight growing political violence in the U.S.
item.description: Donald Trump has faced multiple threats in recent years, with the latest occurring on April 25, 2026, during the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner. This marks the third such incident in t...

item.title: Profile and Details of the Suspected Gunman
item.description: The news article discusses information surrounding a suspected gunman involved in a recent incident. While details remain limited, authorities have described the suspect as acting alone, with no confi...

item.title: Highlights from the London Marathon 2026: World records, fun runners, and a memorable proposal
item.description: The London Marathon 2026 was a remarkable event, drawing over 59,000 participants from across the globe. As the race began in Blackheath and concluded at The Mall, there were numerous memorable moment...

item.title: King Charles’s US state visit to continue despite White House shooting incident
item.description: Buckingham Palace has confirmed that King Charles III’s planned state visit to the United States will proceed as scheduled, despite a shooting incident linked to the White House Correspondents’ Dinner...

item.title: Dodgers Respond to Cubs' Manager's Criticism of Shohei Ohtani's Rule
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers have responded to criticism from Chicago Cubs manager Craig Counsell regarding the 'Ohtani Rule,' a set of regulations aimed at allowing two-way players like Shohei Ohtani to s...

item.title: Trump Confirms Remote Talks with Iran, Appreciates Pakistan’s Mediation Role
item.description: US President Donald Trump confirmed that any further talks with Iran will be conducted remotely, appreciating Pakistan for its mediatory role between Washington and Tehran. Trump emphasized that Islam...

item.title: Meghan Markle hints at end of challenging seven years in recent Instagram posts
item.description: Meghan Markle has suggested that the 'hardest seven years' of her life may be coming to an end. In a series of recent Instagram posts, the Duchess shared a horoscope video that resonated with her Leo ...

item.title: Woman bailed following investigation into fatal Wolverhampton house fire that killed two young children
item.description: A woman in her 30s has been released on police bail after being arrested on suspicion of causing or allowing the deaths of two young children following a fatal house fire in Wolverhampton. The inciden...

item.title: FCT Teachers Resume Work After Government Approves ₦5 Billion Monthly Support
item.description: Teachers for Federal Capital Territory (FCT) don suspend their strike after government intervention led by FCT Minister, Nyesom Wike. The Nigeria Union of Teachers (NUT), through their State Wing Exec...

item.title: Atletico Madrid defeats Athletic Bilbao, boosts morale ahead of Arsenal clash
item.description: Atletico Madrid secured a 3-2 victory over Athletic Bilbao on April 25, 2026, in La Liga, as they geared up for their crucial Champions League semi-final clash with Arsenal. Alexander Sorloth was the ...

item.title: AFP Chief Urges New WESCOM Commander to Uphold Steady Presence in West Philippine Sea
item.description: On April 26, 2026, Vice Admiral Alan Javier formally assumed command of the Armed Forces of the Philippines' Western Command (WESCOM) during a ceremony at Antonio Bautista Air Base in Puerto Princesa ...
